mapper.select:
SELECT d.id AS id, d.member_id AS member_id, m.name AS member_name, d.subscription_id AS subscription_id, p.name AS plan_name, d.type AS type, d.amount AS amount, d.cycle_no AS cycle_no, d.status AS status, d.point_awarded AS point_awarded, d.test_mode AS test_mode, d.paid_at AS paid_at FROM DONATION d JOIN MEMBER m ON d.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN SUBSCRIPTION s ON d.subscription_id = s.id LEFT JOIN SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN p ON s.plan_id = p.id
ORDER BY ${orderBy} LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM DONATION d JOIN MEMBER m ON d.member_id = m.id

SELECT d.id AS id, d.member_id AS member_id, m.name AS member_name, d.subscription_id AS subscription_id, p.name AS plan_name, d.type AS type, d.amount AS amount, d.cycle_no AS cycle_no, d.status AS status, d.point_awarded AS point_awarded, d.test_mode AS test_mode, d.paid_at AS paid_at FROM DONATION d JOIN MEMBER m ON d.member_id = m.id LEFT JOIN SUBSCRIPTION s ON d.subscription_id = s.id LEFT JOIN SUBSCRIPTION_PLAN p ON s.plan_id = p.id WHERE d.id = #{id}
